title: Cognition throne
content:
{{Top|leg}}
[[File:Cognition_Throne.jpg|thumb|right|200px|[[Nina Galfridian]] entering a cognition throne.]]
A '''cognition throne''' was a variant of the [[Tall-Yor|cognition hoods]] used in [[Yorik-et|coralskippers]]. They were used by [[Yuuzhan Vong]] [[Warrior caste|warriors]] to command [[Starship/Legends|starships]] and even entire [[Fleet/Legends|fleets]] while in combat. They were often used in conjunction with [[Blaze bug/Legends|blaze bugs]], which it communicated with via hundreds of fine, flashing antennae.

Cognition thrones were the size of a [[Landspeeder/Legends|landspeeder]] and stood on six stubby legs. At the top was the [[neural cusp]] which connected to the occupant's head with the occupant's arms fitting into specialized arm sacs for additional control. If one was skilled enough when joining with a cognition throne, one could be completely immersed in the entire strategic situation.

==Appearances==
*[[Invasion 5|''Invasion'' 5]]
*[[Invasion: Rescues 1|''Invasion: Rescues'' 1]]
*[[Invasion: Rescues 2|''Invasion: Rescues'' 2]]
*''[[The New Jedi Order: Star by Star]]'' {{1st}}
*''[[The New Jedi Order: Destiny's Way]]''
